title: fix(deps): update module github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v4 to v4.25.9
body:

> Some dependencies could not be looked up. Check the Dependency Dashboard for more information.

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>shirou/gopsutil (github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v4)</summary>

### [`v4.25.9`](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/releases/tag/v4.25.9)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/compare/v4.25.8...v4.25.9)

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v4.25.9 -->

#### What's Changed

##### cpu

- get max Mhz per package without wmi by [@​OrbintSoft](https://redirect.github.com/OrbintSoft) in [#​1919](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1919)
- \[cpu]\[windows]: add logical processor count error handling by [@​shirou](https://redirect.github.com/shirou) in [#​1925](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1925)
- Family and PhysicalID without wmi by [@​OrbintSoft](https://redirect.github.com/OrbintSoft) in [#​1926](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1926)
- Cores count without wmi by [@​OrbintSoft](https://redirect.github.com/OrbintSoft) in [#​1915](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1915)

##### disk

- \[disk]\[linux]: fix lint (gofumpt) by [@​shirou](https://redirect.github.com/shirou) in [#​1928](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1928)
- fix infinite loop by [@​StefanoBalzarottiNozomi](https://redirect.github.com/StefanoBalzarottiNozomi) in [#​1922](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1922)

##### process

- refactor: use slices.Contains to simplify code by [@​wmypku](https://redirect.github.com/wmypku) in [#​1906](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1906)

##### Other Changes

- fix: github action labeler.yml confirugration format by [@​shirou](https://redirect.github.com/shirou) in [#​1918](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1918)
- limit memory usage on warnings list by [@​StefanoBalzarottiNozomi](https://redirect.github.com/StefanoBalzarottiNozomi) in [#​1920](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1920)

#### New Contributors

- [@​wmypku](https://redirect.github.com/wmypku) made their first contribution in [#​1906](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1906)
- [@​StefanoBalzarottiNozomi](https://redirect.github.com/StefanoBalzarottiNozomi) made their first contribution in [#​1920](https://redirect.github.com/shirou/gopsutil/pull/1920)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/shirou/gopsutil/compare/v4.25.8...v4.25.9>

</details>

---
